summary: A single official in a suit speaks directly to camera against a plain blue studio backdrop with burned-in subtitle captions, explaining CBP's work against the illegal sale of trademarked/counterfeit goods and 'empowering the frontline.' It is a straightforward talking-head statement with no music or genre styling, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: Captions: 'illegally selling goods that are trademarked'; 'Empowering the frontline to do what they need to do'; 'where this occurs.'
